html:
The Prestihatitator is the tier 1 Magic station used to prototype basic Magic and Refine recipes. The Prestihatitator is found in the Magic Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype and costs 4 Rabbits, 4 Boards, and 1 Top Hat to craft. Prototyping an item using the Prestihatitator will increase Sanity by 15.

The Prestihatitator has a 10% chance of spawning a Rabbit when used to prototype a new recipe.

Crafting Recipes

See also: Crafting

Prestihatitator allows the prototyping of any following items and structures. Once prototyped, the craftables become unlocked on the Magic Tab, Refine Tab or the Crafting Menu and will no longer require the player to stand next to the Prestihatitator to craft. All craftables offered by Prestihatitator can also be accessed and prototyped from the advanced magic station, Shadow Manipulator. Some character exclusive items also need to be prototyped using a Prestihatitator.

  • Meat Effigy
  • Shadow Manipulator
  • Pan Flute
  • One-man Band
  • Night Light
  • Life Giving Amulet
  • Chilled Amulet
  • Ice Staff
  • Nightmare Fuel
  • Purple Gem
  • Sleepytime Stories

Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Prestihatitator is replaced with the Piratihatitator, which is crafted with a Parrot as the live animal ingredient instead of Rabbits, which are replaced with crabbits in Shipwrecked worlds.

In the Hamlet DLC, the Prestihatitator is replaced with the Hogus Porkusator due to the lack of Rabbits.

Tips

  • As with any other recipe that requires limited use items, any durability Top Hat can be used when crafting a Prestihatitator and will drop a full durability Top Hat when the Prestihatitator is Hammered down.
  • Beardlings can be used instead of Rabbits to craft a Prestihatitator.
  • Rabbits produced from this machine are homeless and sleep outside at night, making them easy food.
  • After a Shadow Manipulator is built, the prestihatitator can be safely destroyed as all its crafts are also covered by the Shadow Manipulator.

Gallery

  • A burnt Prestihatitator from Reign of Giants DLC.
  • First Five of the Prestihatitator's Skins in Don't Starve Together.
  • Dont Starve research machines gif by Kelly [1]

Trivia

  • The name "Prestihatitator" is a portmanteau of "prestidigitator" and "hat".
  • The Prestihatitator spawning Rabbits is a reference to the magic trick of pulling a rabbit from a hat.
  • The Prestihatitator used to have a different recipe: 1 Living Log, 4 Gold Nuggets, and a Top Hat.
  • Winona's quote ("Why do we even have that lever?!") is a reference to The Emperor's New Groove.

References

  1. ↑ Web archive of Kelly Graham's blog.

"researchlab4"
“Who would name something that?”
–Wilson
“I can use the hat like a cauldron!”
–Willow
“Hat not just for head.”
–Wolfgang
“This is but a step from madness.”
–Wendy
“WITH THIS EXTRA POWER I HAVE... MORE POWER!”
–WX-78
“I think the hat collects energy from the air.”
–Wickerbottom
“I like to call it the "Hat Machine"!”
–Woodie
“Quite a dapper machine.”
–Maxwell
“Ah yes! Exactly the knowledge I seek.”
–Wagstaff
“It is an absurd machine that makes meat.”
–Wigfrid
“Did I just hear a squeak?”
–Webber
“That lever's calling to me.”
–Walani
“I won't even try to pronounce it...”
–Warly
“Me ain't had enuff learnin' ta say a word like thet.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA AM LIKE A WIZARD”
–Wilba
“Makes magical things”
–Wormwood
“Well la di da! Aren't you fancy.”
–Wheeler
“Why do we even have that lever?!”
–Winona
“It runs on silly trick power.”
–Wortox
“Think you just made that up, florp.”
–Wurt
“I don't really understand how it's supposed to work.”
–Walter
“If it works, it works.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Prestihatitator là trạm Phép thuật cấp 1 được sử dụng để tạo nguyên mẫu cho các công thức Phép thuật và Tinh chỉnh cơ bản. Prestihatitator được tìm thấy trong Thẻ ma thuật, yêu cầu Máy khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu và tốn 4 Thỏ, 4 Bàn cờ và 1 Mũ chóp để chế tạo. Tạo nguyên mẫu một vật phẩm bằng Prestihatitator sẽ tăng Tinh Thần thêm 15.
